scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mobile-e2e-mcp/contracts build && pnpm --filter @mobile-e2e-mcp/core build && pnpm --filter @mobile-e2e-mcp/adapter-vision build && pnpm --filter @mobile-e2e-mcp/adapter-maestro build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.release:publish: pnpm run bundle && pnpm publish --access public
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: pnpm run bundle && pnpm publish --access public --dry-run --no-git-checks
scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch && pnpm run release:publish
